A '''Zakool''' was a [[Cat/Legends|cat]]-like creature native to the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]]. They appeared to be carnivorous but were not known to attack the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] who lived on the moon. Zakools had dark fur and sharp claws which allowed them to scale trees to an extent.

During the [[Raich crisis|return of the Raich]], the creature used its special ability to control animals, to turn a Zakool against the young Ewoks, [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] and [[Latara/Legends|Latara]]. Luckily, the Raich was eventually defeated by [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]], and the Zakool left the scene, uninterested in the small prey.

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|Rampage of the Phlogs}} {{1st}}
*{{Ewoks|The Raich}}
